name: aggressive_momentum_event_switch
description: Single source of truth for all aggressive-mode risk limits, sector budgets, exit rules. Read by shared/risk_guards.py, shared/momentum_score.py, shared/regime.py, all monitors. NEVER hardcode these values in monitor code — always read via shared.profile.load_profile().

capital._comment_capital: AGGRESSIVE: 98-100% of capital deployed at all times unless kill-switch / defensive_mode / RED_DAY_AFTER_GREEN active, or account state unavailable. Cash reserve 0 (was 10%). Operational buffer 0.5% covers fees + tiny slippage. max_gross 1.50 = up to 1.5× equity in gross notional (Reg-T allows 4× intraday). Single-position 20% caps any one ticker. Sector 55% caps concentrated thematic bets. Intraday governor may TEMPORARILY clamp gross down to 0.25 after RED_DAY_AFTER_GREEN — full deployment resumes on the next session plan from daily-learning.

risk_limits._comment_risk: Daily -3% halts new entries (existing exits keep working). Weekly -7% triggers risk-off bias for next week. Drawdown -12% enables defensive mode (close speculative positions, ban new longs). Drawdown -20% full stop, manual review required.

stocks_etf._comment: Lock profit: once +10% reached, don't let position return below +2%. Trailing after +10% peak, 5% distance.

options._comment: Max loss 40% of paid premium (was -65% in v2.0; tightened). Partial close at +60%, full at +120%. Close before binary events (earnings ±1d unless explicitly allowed).

crypto._comment: Mirrors crypto-monitor v2.4 COIN_TIERS — keep in sync.

regime._comment_detection: hybrid = auto-detect rules + state.json manual override; auto = rules only; manual = state.json only.

auto_rules._comment_auto: Rules-based regime inference. Order: vix>50 → RISK_OFF, spy_5d<-4 → RISK_OFF, energy_5d>+3 AND spy_5d<-2 → INFLATION_SHOCK, vix<25 AND spy_5d>+1.5 → RISK_ON, else NEUTRAL.

RISK_ON._comment: AI/semis momentum + crypto beta. Options long calls preferred.

INFLATION_SHOCK._comment: Rotate into XLE/USO/XOM/CVX/OXY + GLD. Limit AI/semis exposure.

RISK_OFF._comment: Defensive: GLD + TLT. Put spreads on SPY/QQQ (if multi-leg supported). Half-size all entries. No alt longs.

NEUTRAL._comment: Hedge bets. Only top-scored momentum setups. 70% size.

scoring._comment: Composite score [-1, 1]. Long entries require score >= min_score_for_entry. Pre-rank ALL whitelist tickers, scan only top_n_picks per cron tick to focus on leaders.

kill_switch._comment: If 3+ consecutive monitor runs hit data_feed errors → trigger defensive mode. close_all_positions() invoked only on full_stop_pct breach (autonomous when state.json::kill_switch_armed=true, set deterministically by remediation engine).

intraday_profit_protection._comment: Intraday profit governor (shared/intraday_governor.py). Defends a large intraday P&L peak so a day that hits +$5,000 cannot end -$2,000 without deterministic action firing first. State machine FLAT→GREEN→STRONG_GREEN→GIVEBACK_WARN→PROFIT_LOCK→DEFEND_DAY→RED_DAY_AFTER_GREEN ratchets one-way. Each advanced state has its own gross-exposure cap (see intraday_exposure_reduction), entry-block rule, and position MFE harvest rules. State persisted in learning-loop/runtime_state.json (separate from state.json so 5-min monitors don't churn git). Audit events written to journal/autonomy/ for every transition.

profit_floor._comment: Once intraday peak crosses a tier, the floor = peak × lock_ratio. exit-monitor uses this as the minimum acceptable EOD result; if current PnL approaches the floor with no further upside, governor pushes the FSM into GIVEBACK_WARN/PROFIT_LOCK. Tier 3 means a +$5k day must end no worse than +$2.5k or the system has failed its own contract.

intraday_exposure_reduction._comment: Dynamic gross-exposure ceiling driven by intraday governor state. portfolio_risk consults this on every pre-trade gate. Caps shrink monotonically as we ratchet through profit-protection states.

options_intraday._comment: Aggressive paper defaults. 25% of equity can be in options premium (notional much higher). At-risk = 8% of equity is the actual P&L exposure given typical 35-65% drawdown profile. Each option capped at -40% premium loss. Under PROFIT_LOCK/DEFEND_DAY options are closed before stocks/ETFs (premium decays fastest).

pdt_protection._comment: v3.8 (2026-05-14): intent-aware PDT guard. Sub-$25k FINRA rule restricts 4+ day-trades/5-business-days; Alpaca paper bug zeros BP at dt=4. Mode = OK (dt=0) / CAUTION (dt=1) / RESTRICTED (dt=2, save last slot) / LOCKED (dt>=3). CRITICAL design change vs v3.7: OPEN actions are NEVER blocked by daytrade_count (opens don't consume budget — only future same-day closes do). RESTRICTED+ defers OPEN only when intent=intraday (planned same-day flip). CLOSE decisions are budget-aware: overnight positions always ALLOW, crypto always ALLOW, same-day non-emergency in RESTRICTED → DEFER (save slot), in LOCKED → BLOCK. Emergency closes (SL / PROFIT_LOCK / governor / NEARDTH / REGIME / TRAIL) ALWAYS bypass DEFER/BLOCK. swing_max_pct_equity (0.20) is an advisory cap for callers biasing toward fewer larger swing trades when DT budget is tight.
